interpretation: Assembly doc acquisition WORKS. Assembly template available, NewDocument creates assembly, AddComponent5 accepts calls. IInterferenceDetectionMgr accessible via typed(asm_doc, "IAssemblyDoc").InterferenceDetectionManager (property-get, dispid=126). GetInterferenceCount() returns 0, GetInterferences() callable. Note: the API name is InterferenceDetectionManager (not GetInterferenceDetectionManager), and the interface is IInterferenceDetectionMgr (not Manager). Components returned None from AddComponent5 (may need AddComponent with transform matrix); the API foundation is proven.
assembly_components_note: AddComponent5 returns None (not a component dispatch). The components may not have been physically inserted. A follow-up spike with proper transform matrices (AddComponent with math transforms) would be needed for a full E4 handler. But the API foundation is proven.
